func register_lambda_bindings(syntax_tree) {
    new_entry = create_syntax_entry()
    new_entry.type = 'RHO_FUNCTION'
    syntax_tree.children.append(new_entry)
    new_entry.parent = syntax_tree
    current_entry = new_entry

    var_node = syntax_tree.left
    while var_node != nil {
        ste_register_ident(current_entry, var_node.ident)
        var_node = var_node.next
    }

    register_bindings_from_node(current_entry, syntax_tree.left)
    current_entry = current_entry.parent
}
